description: MCP servers validated during cc-mcp-audit development. Commit hashes pin the exact source analyzed; results are reproducible at these hashes.

servers.name: postgres-mcp
servers.notes: FastMCP multi-line decorator pattern. First real-world extraction test. Drove the multi-line @mcp.tool() and mcp.add_tool() extractor fixes. 10 tools after fix (0 before).

servers.name: onchain-mcp
servers.notes: Read-only blockchain data server. Exposed trailing-slash name derivation bug (unknown-repo) and lockfile pattern scan false positives (package-lock.json rate-limit matches). Both fixed.

servers.name: kastell
servers.notes: Infrastructure management CLI with 46 tools. Drove keyword expansion (infrastructure/server management verbs) and refineClassifications fix (overbroad SAFE_EXECUTE_CONTEXTS downgrade). Unknown dropped from 20 to 5.

servers.name: openclaw
servers.notes: Largest tool surface tested (718 tools, 110 sensitive). 3 governance gaps including ungated-write and destructive-without-audit-trail.

servers.name: markitdown
servers.notes: Minimal server -- single read tool for file conversion. Clean posture baseline.

servers.name: netdata
servers.notes: Not an MCP server. Listed in curated index but is a monitoring platform. Pattern scanner found governance patterns in the monitoring codebase. Corpus quality signal: not everything in curated lists is an MCP server.

servers.name: mindsdb
servers.notes: Cleanest governance posture in corpus: 8 Present indicators, 0 gaps. 2 read tools.

servers.name: playwright-mcp
servers.notes: Monorepo wrapper pattern. Tools bundled in playwright-core, registered dynamically at runtime. 0 tools extracted; MCP framework detected. Drove the deep extraction work plan (Layer C: wrapper detection, Layer B: runtime extraction, Layer A: test coverage cross-check).
